title: Red5 Pro Stream
description: Schema representing a live stream on a Red5 Pro server, including publishing configuration, subscriber tracking, and media codec details.

name.description: Unique stream name identifier within the application scope

appName.description: Red5 Pro application scope that contains this stream

clientId.description: Identifier of the publishing client connection

status.description: Current operational status of the stream

protocol.description: Streaming protocol used by the publisher

duration.description: Stream duration in milliseconds since publishing began

subscriberCount.description: Number of currently active subscribers to this stream

bytesIn.description: Total bytes received from the publisher

bytesOut.description: Total bytes sent to all subscribers

VideoTrack.description: Video track properties for a live stream

codec.description: Video codec identifier (e.g., H264, H265, VP8)

frameRate.description: Video frame rate in frames per second

bitrate.description: Video bitrate in bits per second

AudioTrack.description: Audio track properties for a live stream

codec.description: Audio codec identifier (e.g., AAC, MP3, Opus)

channels.description: Number of audio channels (1 for mono, 2 for stereo)

bitrate.description: Audio bitrate in bits per second

enabled.description: Whether recording is currently active for this stream

filePath.description: Server filesystem path where the recording is saved
